query: complementary color clash magenta green photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / clashing_disharmony — magenta-green complementary clashes, jarring color pairs

response.objective_caption: A person with green skin and bright blue liberty spikes styled in a mohawk stands in profile facing right inside a spacious indoor public area. The individual wears a black sleeveless top and a thin chain necklace, with a small earring visible in their left ear. The setting features polished reflective floors, large white columns, warm-toned walls, and other people visible in the background near doorways. Overhead recessed ceiling lights illuminate the space.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person with green skin and bright blue liberty spikes styled in a mohawk stands in profile facing right inside a spacious indoor public area. The background is rendered in deliberate soft focus, causing the surrounding architecture and people to appear indistinct. Visible chromatic aberration produces slight color fringing along the high-contrast edges of the blue spikes against the lighter background. The individual wears a black sleeveless top and a thin chain necklace, with a small earring visible in their left ear. The setting features polished reflective floors, large white columns, and warm-toned walls under overhead lighting.
